arts.ttl: ‘I’m working on it’ - Ter Stegen still hoping to return before end of season
arts.sum: Barcelona goalkeeper Marc-Andre ter Stegen has given a brief update on his recovery from injury and is still hoping to play again before the end of the season. Ter Stegen has been spotted working with the ball on the training ground and isn’t ruling out a comeback before Barca’s season is over.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick quizzed on Neymar back to Barcelona transfer talk
arts.sum: Neymar has been heavily linked with a return to Camp Nou in recent days as a free transfer in the summer, as the Brazilian hopes to play at a high level with the Catalans to prepare himself for the 2026 World Cup. Neymar is linked with Barça every single transfer window and it’s not a surprise to see his name on the rumor mill again, but this might truly be the first time where there’s a real possibility of it happening.

arts.ttl: Barcelona consider move for Espanyol defender

arts.ttl: “It is difficult to find a ceiling for him” – David Villa on Barcelona sensation Lamine Yamal
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal has been a standout performer at Barcelona since he established himself in the first team at the start of last season. During this period, he has dazzled supporters and pundits alike, and former players are equally as amazed. arts.ttl: Bruno Lage quizzed about buying Wolves player – Asked question in press conference
arts.sum: Benfica manager Bruno Lage has refused to be drawn on rumours linking his side with a move for Wolverhampton Wanderers defender Nelson Semedo. A Bola cover comments from the Benfica manager today amid consistent reports around the Wolves man. arts.sum: The left-back has fast become one of the most sought-after teenagers in world football, with a handful of European giants earmarking him as a potential star for the future.
